name: SYS 01 — Website Form Lead Intake
description: Webhook after website intake creates or updates the HubSpot contact, syncs all website_intake_* contact properties plus snapshots, creates or reuses a Website deal, mirrors Contacts and Deals sheet rows, sends a confirmation email, waits for booking_flag, sends a reminder with the kickoff link when needed, and logs each step. This no longer enrolls SYS 02 — Outbound Lead Outreach Sequence.

parameters.content:
## SYS 01 — Website Form Lead Intake

### Purpose
Handle **website intake** submissions after the site or HubSpot form creates the contact. This workflow syncs the website intake fields into HubSpot, creates or reuses the **Website** deal, mirrors the contact and deal into the master sheet, sends a confirmation email, waits, and sends a reminder if the contact still has not booked.

### What it does
1. Parse the website intake webhook body and map all `website_intake_*` contact properties.
2. Create or update the HubSpot contact when only core form fields are present.
3. Tag the contact as inbound and set `hs_lead_status=NEW`.
4. Create or reuse the Website deal in the **kickoff requested** stage.
5. Append the contact and deal to the master sheet **Contacts** and **Deals** tabs.
6. Log `website_form_intake`, `website_kickoff_ack_sent`, and `website_kickoff_reminder_sent` to the Automations Log.
7. Send the confirmation email after intake submission, wait, re-check `booking_flag`, and send a reminder with the kickoff link only if they still have not booked.

### Dependencies
CONFIG, **SW: Create or Update HubSpot Contact**, **SW: Create HubSpot Deal**, **SW: Send Email via Resend**, **SW: Log to Automations Log Sheet**, HubSpot credential, Google Sheets credential.

workflowId.cachedResultName: SW: Create or Update HubSpot Contact

parameters.jsCode:
const parse = $('Parse Webhook Input').first().json;
return [{ json: { ...parse, contactId: parse.contactId } }];

conditions.leftValue: ={{ (() => { const p = $('Parse Webhook Input').first().json; if (p.createDeal === false || p.createDeal === 'false') return 'no'; if (String(p.hubspotDealId || '').trim()) return 'no'; return 'yes'; })() }}

nodes.name: Append or update row in sheet

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, contactId: $('Build CRM Context').first().json.contactId, dealId: $('Build CRM Context').first().json.dealId || null, enrolledInOutreach: false, kickoffReminderDelayHours: ($('Get Config').first().json.timing && $('Get Config').first().json.timing.websiteKickoffReminderHours) ? $('Get Config').first().json.timing.websiteKickoffReminderHours : 48 }) }}

main.node: Append or update row in sheet
